title: Politics is destroying Knysna
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Grey Elephant Investments Pty Ltd (GEI) is shocked and dismayed by a Democratic Alliance newsletter linking GEI to alleged death threats against Knysna Municipality Acting Municipal Manager Mr. Malapeng.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Grey Elephant Investments Pty Ltd (GEI) is shocked and dismayed by a Democratic Alliance newsletter linking GEI to alleged death threats against Knysna Municipality Acting Municipal Manager Mr. Malapeng."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"These insinuations are beyond serious and unacceptable."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEI is helmed by honest, reputable and successful business leaders with impeccable records who run exceptional, award-winning shopping centers and businesses throughout South Africa.","html":"GEI is helmed by honest, reputable and successful business leaders with impeccable records who run exceptional, award-winning shopping centers and businesses throughout South Africa."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The smearing of GEI in what is manifestly an ugly political power struggle has zero foundation and GEI refutes these suggestions in the strongest possible terms.","html":"The smearing of GEI in what is manifestly an ugly political power struggle has zero foundation and GEI refutes these suggestions in the strongest possible terms."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEI assures all its customers, tenants and Knysnarians that it acts lawfully and ethically in all its dealings.","html":"GEI assures all its customers, tenants and Knysnarians that it acts lawfully and ethically in all its dealings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the rates dispute GEI was unlawfully and incorrectly overcharged for municipal services for years.","html":"In the rates dispute GEI was unlawfully and incorrectly overcharged for municipal services for years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"During 2022 and 2023 GEI followed Knysna Municipality’s prescribed policies culminating in an agreed settlement, recommended to be accepted by a specialist seconded from National Treasury and unanimously approved  by the Knysna Municipality Council.","html":"During 2022 and 2023 GEI followed Knysna Municipality’s prescribed policies culminating in an agreed settlement, recommended to be accepted by a specialist seconded from National Treasury and unanimously approved by the Knysna Municipality Council."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The rates dispute has been long since finally settled, including GEI’s full payment of the agreed amounts.","html":"The rates dispute has been long since finally settled, including GEI’s full payment of the agreed amounts."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The ongoing baseless allegations of collusion and corruption involving GEI or its Directors are false, defamatory and simply disproven by facts.","html":"The ongoing baseless allegations of collusion and corruption involving GEI or its Directors are false, defamatory and simply disproven by facts."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The settlement of the rates dispute is now, since October 2024, the subject matter of a High Court review application brought by four individuals and GEI is looking forward to resounding vindication in court.","html":"The settlement of the rates dispute is now, since October 2024, the subject matter of a High Court review application brought by four individuals and GEI is looking forward to resounding vindication in court."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The elevation of vicious small-town rumour concerning GEI to national news by the Democratic Alliance does incalculable harm to our beautiful town.","html":"The elevation of vicious small-town rumour concerning GEI to national news by the Democratic Alliance does incalculable harm to our beautiful town."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEI supports the outcries of the vast majority of Knysna to all our politicians and administrators: Get to constructive work and focus on finding solutions in the best interests of Knysna and its people.","html":"GEI supports the outcries of the vast majority of Knysna to all our politicians and administrators: Get to constructive work and focus on finding solutions in the best interests of Knysna and its people."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEI is absolutely independent of any political affiliations, and we value the ongoing support and trust placed in us by the members of our community.","html":"GEI is absolutely independent of any political affiliations, and we value the ongoing support and trust placed in us by the members of our community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEI cares deeply about Knysna’s well-being and remains at all times committed to building a stronger, more prosperous Knysna for all.","html":"GEI cares deeply about Knysna’s well-being and remains at all times committed to building a stronger, more prosperous Knysna for all."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
